title: wip - Storage rw locks
body: This is a test PR to check for regressions using reader-writer locks in containers/storage.

comments.body: :umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 4deded7) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
Needs a rebase, but we probably should wait til it gets merged into containers/storage.

> Needs a rebase, but we probably should wait til it gets merged into containers/storage.

Agreed. I would love to cut a containers/storage release once it's merged over there.
Closing another PR took care of it.
